context: Tests handling of optional input documents: datamodel.md and architecture.md and whether they drive roadmap and configuration generation.

checklist.name: DATAMODEL Copy
checklist.description: DATAMODEL.md exists in the project root

checklist.name: ARCHITECTURE Copy
checklist.description: ARCHITECTURE.md exists in the project root

checklist.name: Config Update
checklist.description: openspec/config.yaml includes the architecture summary derived directly from the provided architecture document

checklist.name: Roadmap Components
checklist.description: openspec/roadmap.md phases reference the system boundaries, like the 'Core Engine', from the architecture doc

checklist.name: Data Model Proposal
checklist.description: openspec/changes/data-model/proposal.md references specific tables like 'Payments' from the datamodel document

checklist.name: Feature Change
checklist.description: openspec/changes/ directory contains additional folders mapped to the phases from the roadmap
